chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1339 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 24.06.2025 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for Respondents No.1 to 16 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh O R D E R Learned counsel for the Petitioner at the very outset submits that the petitioner withdraws the prayer clause with regard to illegal possession of the Bungalow, lands and property mentioned in para 6 of the Petition. However, counsel submits that the official respondent No.4 / SSP Khairpur at the behest of private respondents is harassing the petitioner. Learned Additional AG states that respondent No.4 has already filed a statement and submits that respondent No.4 shall act strictly in accordance with the law. Counsel appearing for private respondents No.1 to 16 also submits that they have not harassed the petitioner and that protection has already been provided by the Additional Sessions Judge / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Gambat in Crl. Misc. Appln. No.2082 of 2024 (Re- Pir Syed Ali Raza Shah vs. The State and others) vide order dated 03.07.2024. Learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied with the statements of the learned Additional AG and learned counsel for the private respondents seeks disposal of this petition. The petition is disposed of while directing the official respondents, particularly respondent No.4 that they shall act strictly in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
